business_question: How many distinct customers made purchases through the Store channel in each quarter of 2003?
business_context: The store channel team needs quarterly active customer counts to evaluate campaign reach and seasonal engagement.

aggregation_logic.Distinct Store Customers per Quarter: COUNT(DISTINCT customer_sk) grouped by d_qoy for year 2003

chain_of_thought: Use store_sales to access store channel customer transactions.
Join to date_dim and filter to d_year = 2003.
Group by d_qoy (quarter of year) and apply COUNT DISTINCT on customer key.
Order by quarter to show seasonal customer engagement trend.
sql_answer:
SELECT
  d.d_qoy AS quarter,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_customer_sk) AS distinct_customers
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 2003
GROUP BY d.d_qoy
ORDER BY d.d_qoy;
